Bookkeeper CRM
Self-Hosted AI Ready

Your Complete Bookkeeping Command Center

Multi-account CRM connecting all your Gmail, Outlook, Google Drive, OneDrive, and Calendars in one place. Built for bookkeepers who manage multiple clients across multiple platforms.

Everything You Need

Client Management

Track all clients with contact info, company details, tax IDs, status tracking, and notes.

Active Prospect Inactive

Unified Inbox

All emails from multiple Gmail and Outlook accounts in one place. Never miss a client message.

Gmail x3 Outlook x3

Tasks & Recurring

One-time and auto-recurring tasks. Set frequency: daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly.

High Medium Low

Unified Calendar

View all events across Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar. Schedule client meetings in one view.

Google Outlook

Unified Files

Access all files from multiple Google Drives and OneDrives in one file browser.

Drive x3 OneDrive x3

Invoicing

Create, send, and track invoices. Monitor revenue and outstanding amounts per client.

Paid Sent Overdue

AI Agent Integration

Connect your AI bookkeeper, executive assistant, and custom agents via webhooks.

Bookkeeper Assistant

Self-Hosted on Your Infrastructure

Complete data ownership. Host on your VPS, cloud server, or local machine. Docker + Docker Compose ready.

Docker MySQL tRPC React 19

Built for Scale

Bookkeeper CRM

Enterprise-grade CRM for bookkeepers. Multi-account. Self-hosted. AI-ready.

Version 2.0.0 | Built with tRPC + Drizzle + React
